summary: The diff implements the vast majority of the Jenkins Insurance Agency demo site requirements. All 16 REQ items have corresponding components and wiring. However, several specific acceptance criteria details are partially or not met: the hero H1 uses different wording than specified, the sticky mobile bar has a WhatsApp button instead of a 'Get Quote' scroll button, the carrier badges list includes extra carriers and is missing 'Foremost', the bilingual section lacks an explicit English sentence, the trust bar 4th stat is non-animating, and the reviews aggregate count is wrong.

missing_requirements.requirement: Hero H1 must read exactly 'Your Local Insurance Agent in The Woodlands, TX'
missing_requirements.reason: JenkinsHero.tsx uses 'The Woodlands' Most Trusted Independent Insurance Agent' instead of the specified H1 copy

missing_requirements.requirement: Trust bar stat '100% Local Texas Agent' with count-up animation from 0 to final value
missing_requirements.reason: JenkinsTrustBar.tsx sets the 4th stat value to 0 with label 'The Woodlands, TX Local' and the count-up hook skips it (target===0 branch), so no count-up animation fires for that stat and the label does not match '100% Local Texas Agent'

missing_requirements.requirement: Carrier badges must include exactly Progressive, Travelers, Nationwide, Liberty Mutual, Safeco, and Foremost
missing_requirements.reason: JenkinsCarrierBadges.tsx omits 'Foremost' entirely while adding MetLife, Allstate, TWFG, Hartford, and Farmers which were not requested

missing_requirements.requirement: Google Reviews aggregate rating summary must show 47 reviews
missing_requirements.reason: JenkinsReviews.tsx displays 'Based on 127 Google Reviews' instead of the spec-required 47 reviews

missing_requirements.requirement: Bilingual section must contain both English and Spanish text including the phrase 'Hablamos Espanol - Se Habla Espanol. Llamenos hoy para una cotizacion gratuita.'
missing_requirements.reason: JenkinsBilingual.tsx contains only Spanish text with no distinct English sentence establishing the bilingual nature beyond the heading; the required English copy is absent

missing_requirements.requirement: Mobile sticky bottom bar must have 'Call Now' and 'Get Quote' (scrolls to #quote) buttons side by side
missing_requirements.reason: JenkinsStickyMobileBar.tsx implements 'Call Now' and a 'WhatsApp' link button; the 'Get Quote' scroll-to-#quote button is replaced with a WhatsApp deeplink, not a scroll-to-quote action

hallucinated_features.description: Footer includes an email address 'cjenkins@twfg.com' and social media icons (Facebook, LinkedIn) via react-icons library
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify an email address or social media links in the footer; react-icons is also an additional third-party dependency not requested

hallucinated_features.description: Carrier badge row includes 10 carriers instead of the 6 specified, adding MetLife, Allstate, TWFG, Hartford, and Farmers
hallucinated_features.reason: Only Progressive, Travelers, Nationwide, Liberty Mutual, Safeco, and Foremost were requested; the extra carriers were not requested

hallucinated_features.description: Mobile sticky bar shows a WhatsApp deeplink button instead of the specified 'Get Quote' scroll-to-#quote button
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-14 specifies 'Call Now' and 'Get Quote' scroll to #quote; a WhatsApp button in the mobile sticky bar was not requested

hallucinated_features.description: Schema.org InsuranceAgency structured data JSON-LD script added to index.html
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement for structured data or JSON-LD was included in the build request

hallucinated_features.description: Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags added to index.html
hallucinated_features.reason: Social media meta tags were not requested in the build request

hallucinated_features.description: JenkinsAbout.tsx shows 4 stat boxes (Years, Clients, Carriers, Rating) instead of the specified 3 stat boxes labeled Families Served, Carriers, Years
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-8 specifies exactly 3 inline stat boxes; the implementation adds a 4th and changes the labels
